display.purpose: Screen-level headings and major section titles. DM Serif only.

headline.purpose: Component headers, panel titles, dialog names. Outfit semibold.

body.purpose: Descriptive and instructional text. Outfit regular.

label.purpose: Section markers, badge text, metadata categories. Uppercase, tracked, short.

shadows.name: soft
shadows.purpose: Resting card lift. Second choice after tonal layering.

shadows.name: float
shadows.purpose: Hover state and open panel elevation.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Main CTA. Warm sand fill, inviting rather than commanding. Full-width on mobile.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 8px; width: 100%; padding: 15px 22px; border-radius: 16px; background: #C4A882; color: #2C2B28; font-family: Outfit, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.93rem; font-weight: 600; border: none; cursor: pointer; transition: background 260ms cubic-bezier(.4,0,.2,1), transform 260ms cubic-bezier(.4,0,.2,1); -webkit-tap-highlight-color: transparent; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #b89a76; } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: scale(0.97); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #7A9E8E; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Secondary or dismiss action. Parchment background, ink-mid text. Less prominent.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; padding: 8px 12px; border-radius: 10px; background: #FAF8F4; color: #5C5A56; font-family: Outfit, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.8rem; font-weight: 600; border: 1px solid #EDEAE2; cursor: pointer; transition: background 260ms cubic-bezier(.4,0,.2,1); } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background: #F0EDE6; } .ds-btn-ghost:active { transform: scale(0.97); } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #7A9E8E; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Destructive Button
components.description: Used for logout, deletion, irreversible actions. Terra text on white.
components.css: .ds-btn-destructive { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; width: 100%; padding: 8px 12px; border-radius: 10px; background: #ffffff; color: #B8714E; font-family: Outfit, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.8rem; font-weight: 600; border: 1px solid #EDEAE2; cursor: pointer; transition: background 260ms cubic-bezier(.4,0,.2,1); } .ds-btn-destructive:hover { background: #FAF8F4; } .ds-btn-destructive:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #B8714E; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Standard form input. Parchment background, sage focus glow.
components.css: .ds-input-wrap { width: 100%; } .ds-input { width: 100%; box-sizing: border-box; background: #FAF8F4; border: 1.5px solid #EDEAE2; border-radius: 10px; padding: 12px 14px; font-family: Outfit, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.92rem; color: #2C2B28; outline: none; transition: border-color 260ms cubic-bezier(.4,0,.2,1), box-shadow 260ms cubic-bezier(.4,0,.2,1); } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #9B9892; } .ds-input:focus { border-color: #7A9E8E; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(122,158,142,0.13); }

components.name: Textarea
components.description: Multi-line idea or note input. Same base as text input, minimum 82px height.
components.css: .ds-textarea { width: 100%; box-sizing: border-box; background: #FAF8F4; border: 1.5px solid #EDEAE2; border-radius: 10px; padding: 12px 14px; font-family: Outfit, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.92rem; color: #2C2B28; outline: none; resize: none; min-height: 82px; line-height: 1.6; transition: border-color 260ms cubic-bezier(.4,0,.2,1), box-shadow 260ms cubic-bezier(.4,0,.2,1); } .ds-textarea::placeholder { color: #9B9892; } .ds-textarea:focus { border-color: #7A9E8E; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(122,158,142,0.13); }

components.name: Trip Card
components.description: Saved trip item in the plans drawer. Shows trip name, location, date and a badge.
components.css: .ds-trip-card { display: block; width: 100%; background: #ffffff; border: 1.5px solid #EDEAE2; border-radius: 16px; padding: 12px; text-align: left; cursor: pointer; box-shadow: 0 1px 4px rgba(44,43,40,.06), 0 2px 12px rgba(44,43,40,.04); transition: transform 200ms cubic-bezier(.4,0,.2,1), border-color 200ms cubic-bezier(.4,0,.2,1); } .ds-trip-card:hover { transform: translateY(-1px); border-color: #9B9892; } .ds-trip-card__header { display: flex; align-items: flex-start; justify-content: space-between; gap: 8px; } .ds-trip-card__name { font-family: Outfit, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.88rem; font-weight: 600; color: #2C2B28; margin: 0; } .ds-trip-card__meta { font-family: Outfit, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.74rem; color: #5C5A56; margin: 2px 0 0; } .ds-trip-card__badge { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; border-radius: 9999px; padding: 3px 8px; font-family: Outfit, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.65rem; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.08em; text-transform: uppercase; white-space: nowrap; } .ds-trip-card__badge--yours { background: #7A9E8E; color: #ffffff; } .ds-trip-card__badge--shared { background: #C4A882; color: #2C2B28; } .ds-trip-card__date { font-family: Outfit, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.7rem; color: #9B9892; margin: 8px 0 0; }

components.name: Toast Notification
components.description: System feedback: confirmations, errors, status messages. Auto-dismisses at 2.6s.
components.html: Plan created and added to your trips.
components.css: @keyframes ds-pop-in { from { opacity: 0; transform: scale(0.87); } to { opacity: 1; transform: scale(1); } } .ds-toast { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; padding: 10px 16px; border-radius: 16px; background: #2C2B28; color: #F7F5F0; font-family: Outfit, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.86rem; font-weight: 500; box-shadow: 0 4px 16px rgba(44,43,40,.18); animation: ds-pop-in 220ms cubic-bezier(.34,1.56,.64,1) both; max-width: 340px; } @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) { .ds-toast { animation: none; } }

components.name: Section Label
components.description: Uppercase tracking label used as a section identifier — one per UI section maximum.
components.css: .ds-section-label { font-family: Outfit, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.68rem; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.12em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #9B9892; margin: 0; }

narrative.overview:
TravelSync's visual language is built on quiet confidence. Typography does the primary organizational work — DM Serif for display moments, Outfit for everything operational. The interface recedes so the trip can feel real. Nothing decorative that doesn't earn its place; every element either clarifies a decision or confirms an action.

Depth is tonal, not shadowed. Surfaces layer from cream to parchment to white, creating a hierarchy of planes without architectural shadow weight. Sage green acts as the system's trusted marker: used sparingly, it always means 'this matters.' Sand and terra carry human warmth — the invitation to act, the alert that something needs attention.

The system explicitly rejects: generic SaaS hero aesthetics (navy gradients, metric grids, illustration-heavy landing zones), AI product glass/dark treatments (glassmorphism, purple gradients, 'powered by AI' as decoration), and booking-site density (star ratings, compressed card grids, stock photography).
keyCharacteristics: Typography-led hierarchy: DM Serif announces, Outfit operates
Tonal layering: cream → parchment → white as the depth axis
Sage as signal, not fill: discipline in primary accent usage
Sand and terra for warmth and human action moments
Motion is earned: animations on confirmation, transition, and empty states only

rules.name: The One Marker Rule
rules.body: Prepared Sage (#7A9E8E) appears on ≤15% of any given screen. It is a signal, not a surface color. The moment it covers more area, it loses its authority.

rules.name: The Warmth-Through-Action Rule
rules.body: Warm Sand (#C4A882) appears on CTAs and affirming moments — not on decorative elements or as an ambient fill. Warmth is earned by what it accompanies.

rules.name: The Display-Earns-Its-Place Rule
rules.body: DM Serif Display appears only on screen-level headings and major content titles. Prohibited on UI labels, tab text, badge copy, button labels, and navigational elements.

rules.name: The Label Ceiling Rule
rules.body: Uppercase tracking labels are limited to one per discrete UI section, on identifiers of 4 words or fewer. They are identifiers, not decoration.

rules.name: The Flat-by-Default Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat at rest. The presence of a shadow means something is in a state — hovered, open, elevated. A permanent resting shadow is decorative elevation, which is prohibited.

rules.name: The Tonal-First Rule
rules.body: Before reaching for a shadow, ask whether a background shift (cream → parchment, or parchment → white) achieves the same depth. Shadows are the second tool, not the first.

dos: Do use Prepared Sage (#7A9E8E) as a signal — focus rings, selected states, active indicators — never as a large fill.
Do establish depth through tonal layering: cream (page) → parchment (card) → white (elevated dialog). Reach for shadows second.
Do use DM Serif Display exclusively for screen-level headings.
Do limit uppercase tracked labels to one per UI section, 4 words or fewer.
Do ensure all body text hits ≥4.5:1 contrast against its background.
Do pair every animation with a prefers-reduced-motion alternative.
Do use Warm Sand (#C4A882) on CTAs and affirming moments — an invitation, not a command.
donts: Don't use border-left or border-right greater than 1px as a colored accent stripe on cards or callouts.
Don't use gradient text (background-clip: text + gradient). Use a solid color.
Don't use glassmorphism decoratively. The side panel backdrop-blur is the one intentional exception.
Don't build SaaS-style hero zones: navy gradients, metric grids, hero illustrations, or gradient CTAs.
Don't use purple gradients, dark glassmorphism, or 'powered by AI' as a design element.
Don't build dense booking-site layouts: compressed card grids with star ratings, stock photography collages.
Don't add an uppercase tracking eyebrow above every section heading — one per section, identifiers only.
Don't place ink-faint (#9B9892) on actionable or meaningful text — approved for placeholder hints only.
Don't animate CSS layout properties (width, height, top, left, padding). Animate transform and opacity only.
